reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is not well-suited for sleep (Primary). The presence of a white dining table, chairs, and other furniture makes it unsuitable for sleep. The cold white floor, walls, and window also contribute to the unsuitability. The white radiator and curtains further reduce the suitability for sleep.
